name: Harry Chapin
abstract: Harry Forster Chapin (; December 7, 1942 – July 16, 1981) was an American singer-songwriter, philanthropist, and hunger activist best known for his folk rock and pop rock songs. He achieved worldwide success in the 1970s.

about_quotes.speaker: Jay Cee Johnson
about_quotes.evidence: And we had Jim Chapin, Harry Chapin's father, doing a jazz performance at the college.

about_quotes.speaker: Phil Woods
about_quotes.evidence: Jim Chapin has, the son became a very successful pop singer [Harry Chapin]
about_quotes.doc_title: Phil Woods — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
